turns.text: Thanks for calling Sears Home Services — what appliance can I help you with today?
Hi, my oven is acting up.
Sorry to hear that — what's happening with it?
I actually smell gas near the oven when I try to turn it on.
Got it — have you tried checking if the igniter is clicking properly?
Should I try running the self-clean cycle?
Sure, that might help clear it up.
Let me know how it goes!

symptoms.description: smells gas near the oven when turning it on
